summary: Backend = openspec, driven task-by-task through /kbd-apply. 8 changes dispatched with per-change model routing (frontier→Opus 4.8: C1/C2/C3/C5/C7; medium→Sonnet 4.6: C4/C6; small→Haiku 4.5: C8). First pending change: v2-crdt-merge-strategy-port (Round 1 foundation, unblocks C2/C3). progress.json initialized in orchestrator changes-map schema (8 changes, all PENDING). Execute is orchestration only — no code written this stage.
approval_gates: BRANCH GATE: on main — create feat/v2-realtime-fabric-parity before /kbd-apply writes code
FLINT DEP GATE (C3): frf-sdk not on npm — confirm workspace link or apply shim+guard only
C7 DECISION GATE: spike must write adopt-later-vs-ceiling-doc decision; may slip to v2.1
verification: per change: pnpm run typecheck + pnpm run test
export-touching (C1-C4): pnpm run refresh:exports + pnpm run verify:skills
reflection_handoff: Consume per-change DONE/BLOCKED, the C7 spike decision, any optional-peer contract changes, and whether to track Flint's Loro-vs-Automerge CRDT decision as a follow-up change.
